caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, focusing on political developments. The frames show a group of men walking together, with one man in a white shirt and another in a black vest being prominently featured. The text overlays indicate that Sumit Kumar Singh, an MLA from Delhi, has been appointed as a minister. The news ticker at the bottom provides additional context, mentioning other political figures such as Tejashwi and Nitish Kumar. The visuals and text suggest a significant political event or announcement, likely related to cabinet reshuffles or new appointments within the government. The timestamp indicates that the segment was broadcast around 10:09 PM.
